title: An Act empowering municipalities and local governments

abstracts.abstract: So much of the message from Her Excellency the Governor recommending legislation relative to empowering municipalities and local governments [for message, see House, No. 56] as relates to sections 18, 19, 83, 84 and 88. Public Service

actions.description: Being a published document containing sections 18, 19, 83, 84 and 88 of House document numbered 56
Bill reported favorably by committee and referred to the committees on Rules of the two branches, acting concurrently

related_entities.name: the committees on Rules of the two branches, acting concurrently

actions.description: Discharged to the committee on House Rules
